name: Website Contact Form Acknowledgment (SYNTHETIC FIXTURE)
description: A fully synthetic, evidence-complete contract used as a fixture for the Contract Scenario Generator and Contract Harness tests. Not a real business, not real data -- originally authored and hand-verified as a live synthetic validation contract (2026-07-21), promoted to a permanent checked-in fixture because, unlike the other two checked-in fixtures, its EvidenceRequirements fully cover every transition into every terminal outcome.

entity.name: ContactFormSubmission
entity.description: A single synthetic website contact-form submission.

correlationKey.description: The submitter's email address (synthetic, .test TLD only).

promise.text: Every website contact form submission is acknowledged within 1 business hour, assigned to an owner, and flagged if required contact info is missing or no acknowledgment happens in time.

startConditions.description: A visitor submits the contact form.

states.name: Missing Info
states.description: Required contact info was missing from the submission.

states.name: No Response
states.description: No acknowledgment happened before the expiration window.

events.name: Flag Missing Info
events.description: Required contact info was found missing.

terminalOutcomes.description: Submission was acknowledged in time with complete info.
Submission could not be actioned -- required contact info was missing.
Submission was never acknowledged within the expiration window.

exceptions.condition: No acknowledgment sent within 1 business hour of submission
exceptions.suggestedAction: Contact the submitter directly and log the outcome.

evidenceRequirements.description: The acknowledgment record: which owner handled it and how.
Which required field(s) were missing from the submission.
